description: A project expediter needs to track the status of a shipment of custom-fabricated steel to ensure it arrives on time.

nodes.task_description: Find the purchase order for the custom steel.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the correct purchase order.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to get the latest status and the shipping/tracking number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates with the supplier and gets the tracking information.

nodes.task_description: Use the tracking number to get the latest location from the freight carrier and update the project's material tracking report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the shipment's current location and updates the project records with the new ETA.
